---
title: "Tree 343 - Soft Tree Fern"
toc: false
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_trees_from_epicollect.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

![Tree 343 - Soft Tree Fern](/assets/images/trees/tree343.jpg)

{{< include '_tree-species-info/_soft-tree-fern.md' >}}

## Tree data

**Planted:** SK: Evolution Garden
